surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal merge-resolver + F5b finalize tooling (churn_merge / resolve_churn_conflicts / integrate_main / campaign_status_io); no startable app stack in this monorepo. The WebUI-consumed campaigns status.json SCHEMA is unchanged (same fields) — byte-parity to the existing campaign_progress producer — so no frontend contract is touched. Empirical verification: 41 campaign-status unit/integration tests (producer->consumer byte-parity, concurrent-sibling merge, scoped regen, rollback) + a real-campaign Boundary Probe projecting 2026-06-07-tracked-campaign-status (S1/S2 complete self-healed, idempotent, never-downgrade).

behaviors.behavior: AC2 is_campaign_status single-segment glob (normalise; reject nested/md/outside/empty-slug)
AC2 classify admits campaign status via glob; still blocks campaign.md + source
AC3 resolver placeholder-resolves a status.json conflict (--theirs); md conflict blocks
AC1/AC3 scoped regen re-projects ONLY named campaigns from events + stages (byte-parity)
B1 untouched campaign left byte-identical (scoped, not glob-all)
campaign regen is opt-in via campaign_status_rels (absent rels -> no regen)
AC1 finalize Step 6 writes per-tree board (byte-parity to pure producer)
finalize skips: non-campaign / absent dir / invalid-slug / symlink target
behaviors.evidence: test_finalize_campaign_status::test_run_skips_campaign_status_for_non_campaign_iterate + test_run_skips_when_campaign_dir_absent + test_run_skips_symlinked_status_target (runs on CI/POSIX; platform-skips where symlink unprivileged) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC3 integrate concurrent-sibling regenerate (single-line conflict -> union projection)
M2 production multi-line non-overlapping subs auto-merge correct (no conflict, no corruption)
AC3 events_invalid aborts BEFORE any campaign regen
integrate rollback restores campaign status.json on regenerate failure
events-log path SSoT: campaign_status_io resolves via resolve_events_path (worktree-reachable)
